phase_name: Phase BG — Enterprise SDK 基石

baseline.notes: BG adds ~50 new Python SDK tests in sdk/python/tests/

W1.description: specs/ JSON Schema + Python Pydantic 模型

W2.description: authoring 创作工具链 (parser + validator + scaffold + hook_builder)

W4.description: RuntimeSandbox + MultiRuntimeSandbox (gRPC 直连 + 对比)

W5.description: CLI + submit + HR 入职示例 Skill

W6.description: 设计文档 + Makefile + ROADMAP 更新

deferred.BG-D1: Policy DSL (需 L3 策略编译器, BH)
deferred.BG-D2: Playbook DSL (需 L4 事件总线, BI)
deferred.BG-D3: 5 个 L3/L4 REST API 完整客户端 (需 5 API 契约, BH)
deferred.BG-D4: TypeScript SDK (需 Python SDK 稳定)
deferred.BG-D8: eaasp promote 命令 (需 L3 RBAC)

key_decisions.BG-KD1: Python SDK 先行（参考实现）
key_decisions.BG-KD2: specs/ JSON Schema 是跨语言源头
key_decisions.BG-KD3: SDK 不内嵌运行模拟器
key_decisions.BG-KD4: sandbox 支持 gRPC 直连 L1（开发测试限定）
key_decisions.BG-KD9: proto stubs 复用现有生成方式
key_decisions.BG-KD10: 后续 SDK 在独立分支并行

previous_phase.name: Phase BF — L2 统一资产层 + L1 抽象机制

notes: Phase BG COMPLETE: 6/6 tasks, 107 SDK tests. Makefile targets: sdk-setup/test/validate/build. ROADMAP + NEXT_SESSION_GUIDE updated. Ready for Phase BH (L3 治理层).
